  "specs": [
    {
      "source_url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7951.md",
      "title": "EIP-7951: Precompile for secp256r1 Curve Support",
      "sub_graphs": [
        {
          "id": "SG-001",
          "name": "p256verify_main",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-001_p256verify_main.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_gas",
              "q_decode",
              "q_validate",
              "q_fail_validation",
              "q_verify",
              "q_check_result",
              "q_success",
              "q_fail_verify"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_gas",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "charge 6900 gas",
              "decode input(h, r, s, qx, qy)",
              "input_validation(h, r, s, qx, qy)",
              "validation failed",
              "validation passed",
              "return empty",
              "signature_verification(h, r, s, qx, qy)",
              "verified = true",
              "verified = false",
              "return 0x01 (32 bytes)"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "charge 6900 gas",
                "q_gas"
              ],
              [
                "q_gas",
                "decode input(h, r, s, qx, qy)",
                "q_decode"

              [

              [

                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Precompile MUST NOT revert under any circumstances",
            "INV-002: Gas cost is always 6900 regardless of execution path",
            "INV-003: Output is exactly 32 bytes on success or 0 bytes on failure"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-002",
          "name": "input_validation",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-002_input_validation.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_check_len",
              "q_fail_len",
              "q_check_r",
              "q_fail_r",
              "q_check_s",
              "q_fail_s",
              "q_check_qx",
              "q_fail_qx",
              "q_check_qy",
              "q_fail_qy",
              "q_check_curve",
              "q_fail_curve",
              "q_check_inf",
              "q_fail_inf",
              "q_valid"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_check_len",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "input_length != 160",
              "input_length == 160",
              "return false",
              "r <= 0 or r >= n",
              "0 < r < n",
              "s <= 0 or s >= n",
              "0 < s < n",
              "qx >= p",
              "0 <= qx < p",
              "qy >= p",
              "0 <= qy < p",
              "qy^2 != qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
              "qy^2 == qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
              "(qx, qy) == (0, 0)",
              "(qx, qy) != (0, 0)",
              "return true"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "input_length != 160",
                "q_check_len"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_len",
                "input_length != 160",
                "q_fail_len"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_len",
                "input_length == 160",
                "q_check_r"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_len",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_r",
                "r <= 0 or r >= n",
                "q_fail_r"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_r",
                "0 < r < n",
                "q_check_s"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_r",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_s",
                "s <= 0 or s >= n",
                "q_fail_s"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_s",
                "0 < s < n",
                "q_check_qx"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_s",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_qx",
                "qx >= p",
                "q_fail_qx"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_qx",
                "0 <= qx < p",
                "q_check_qy"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_qx",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_qy",
                "qy >= p",
                "q_fail_qy"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_qy",
                "0 <= qy < p",
                "q_check_curve"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_qy",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_curve",
                "qy^2 != qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
                "q_fail_curve"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_curve",
                "qy^2 == qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
                "q_check_inf"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_curve",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_inf",
                "(qx, qy) == (0, 0)",
                "q_fail_inf"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_inf",
                "(qx, qy) != (0, 0)",
                "q_valid"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_inf",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_valid",
                "return true",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Validation checks MUST be performed in order: length, r bounds, s bounds, qx bounds, qy bounds, curve equation, infinity",
            "INV-002: Both r and s must satisfy 0 < value < n (subgroup order)",
            "INV-003: Both qx and qy must satisfy 0 <= value < p (field modulus)",
            "INV-004: Point (qx, qy) must satisfy the secp256r1 curve equation",
            "INV-005: Point (qx, qy) must not be the point at infinity (0, 0)"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-003",
          "name": "signature_verification",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-003_signature_verification.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_mod_inv",
              "q_scalar1",
              "q_scalar2",
              "q_ecmul1",
              "q_ecmul2",
              "q_ecadd",
              "q_check_inf",
              "q_fail_inf",
              "q_extract_x",
              "q_compare",
              "q_success",
              "q_fail_cmp"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_mod_inv",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "s1 = s^(-1) (mod n)",
              "u1 = h * s1 (mod n)",
              "u2 = r * s1 (mod n)",
              "P1 = u1 * G",
              "P2 = u2 * (qx, qy)",
              "R_prime = P1 + P2",
              "R_prime is point at infinity",
              "R_prime is not point at infinity",
              "return false",
              "r_prime = R_prime.x",
              "r_prime == r (mod n)",
              "r_prime != r (mod n)",
              "return true"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "s1 = s^(-1) (mod n)",
                "q_mod_inv"
              ],
              [
                "q_mod_inv",
                "u1 = h * s1 (mod n)",
                "q_scalar1"
              ],
              [
                "q_scalar1",
                "u2 = r * s1 (mod n)",
                "q_scalar2"
              ],
              [
                "q_scalar2",
                "P1 = u1 * G",
                "q_ecmul1"
              ],
              [
                "q_ecmul1",
                "P2 = u2 * (qx, qy)",
                "q_ecmul2"
              ],
              [
                "q_ecmul2",
                "R_prime = P1 + P2",
                "q_ecadd"
              ],
              [
                "q_ecadd",
                "R_prime is point at infinity",
                "q_fail_inf"
              ],
              [
                "q_ecadd",
                "R_prime is not point at infinity",
                "q_extract_x"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_inf",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_extract_x",
                "r_prime = R_prime.x",
                "q_compare"
              ],
              [
                "q_compare",
                "r_prime == r (mod n)",
                "q_success"
              ],
              [
                "q_compare",
                "r_prime != r (mod n)",
                "q_fail_cmp"
              ],
              [
                "q_success",
                "return true",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_cmp",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Modular inverse s1 must be computed modulo subgroup order n",
            "INV-002: Point at infinity check on R_prime is REQUIRED (fixes RIP-7212 vulnerability)",
            "INV-003: Comparison must use modular reduction r_prime == r (mod n), not direct equality (fixes RIP-7212 vulnerability)",
            "INV-004: Scalar multiplications and point addition use secp256r1 group operations"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-004",
          "name": "point_validity_check",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-004_point_validity_check.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_check_bounds_x",
              "q_fail_bounds",
              "q_check_bounds_y",
              "q_fail_bounds_y",
              "q_compute_lhs",
              "q_compute_rhs",
              "q_compare",
              "q_on_curve",
              "q_not_on_curve",
              "q_check_inf",
              "q_is_inf",
              "q_valid"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_check_bounds_x",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "0 <= qx < p",
              "qx >= p",
              "qx in range",
              "qy >= p",
              "qy in range",
              "lhs = qy^2 (mod p)",
              "rhs = qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
              "lhs == rhs",
              "lhs != rhs",
              "(qx, qy) == (0, 0)",
              "(qx, qy) != (0, 0)",
              "return false",
              "return true"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "0 <= qx < p",
                "q_check_bounds_x"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_bounds_x",
                "qx >= p",
                "q_fail_bounds"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_bounds_x",
                "qx in range",
                "q_check_bounds_y"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_bounds",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_bounds_y",
                "qy >= p",
                "q_fail_bounds_y"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_bounds_y",
                "qy in range",
                "q_compute_lhs"
              ],
              [
                "q_fail_bounds_y",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_compute_lhs",
                "lhs = qy^2 (mod p)",
                "q_compute_rhs"
              ],
              [
                "q_compute_rhs",
                "rhs = qx^3 + a*qx + b (mod p)",
                "q_compare"
              ],
              [
                "q_compare",
                "lhs == rhs",
                "q_on_curve"
              ],
              [
                "q_compare",
                "lhs != rhs",
                "q_not_on_curve"
              ],
              [
                "q_not_on_curve",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_on_curve",
                "point is on curve",
                "q_check_inf"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_inf",
                "(qx, qy) == (0, 0)",
                "q_is_inf"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_inf",
                "(qx, qy) != (0, 0)",
                "q_valid"
              ],
              [
                "q_is_inf",
                "return false",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_valid",
                "return true",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Field element bounds check uses field modulus p, not subgroup order n",
            "INV-002: Curve equation is y^2 = x^3 + ax + b (mod p) with secp256r1 parameters",
            "INV-003: Point (0, 0) is not on secp256r1 and represents point at infinity by convention"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-005",
          "name": "input_decoding",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-005_input_decoding.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_read_h",
              "q_read_r",
              "q_read_s",
              "q_read_qx",
              "q_read_qy"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_read_h",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "h = input[0..32] (BigEndian)",
              "r = input[32..64] (BigEndian)",
              "s = input[64..96] (BigEndian)",
              "qx = input[96..128] (BigEndian)",
              "qy = input[128..160] (BigEndian)",
              "return (h, r, s, qx, qy)"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "h = input[0..32] (BigEndian)",
                "q_read_h"
              ],
              [
                "q_read_h",
                "r = input[32..64] (BigEndian)",
                "q_read_r"
              ],
              [
                "q_read_r",
                "s = input[64..96] (BigEndian)",
                "q_read_s"
              ],
              [
                "q_read_s",
                "qx = input[96..128] (BigEndian)",
                "q_read_qx"
              ],
              [
                "q_read_qx",
                "qy = input[128..160] (BigEndian)",
                "q_read_qy"
              ],
              [
                "q_read_qy",
                "return (h, r, s, qx, qy)",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Input is exactly 160 bytes, split into five 32-byte fields",
            "INV-002: All fields are BigEndian-encoded unsigned integers",
            "INV-003: Scalars (h, r, s) are not required to be less than n at decoding stage"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-006",
          "name": "gas_consumption",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7951/SG-006_gas_consumption.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_check_gas",
              "q_charge",
              "q_oog",
              "q_execute",
              "q_return_success",
              "q_return_fail"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_check_gas",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "available_gas >= 6900",
              "available_gas < 6900",
              "revert out-of-gas",
              "remaining_gas = available_gas - 6900",
              "execution returns result",
              "execution returns empty",
              "return result (gas consumed = 6900)",
              "return empty (gas consumed = 6900)"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "available_gas >= 6900",
                "q_check_gas"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_gas",
                "available_gas >= 6900",
                "q_charge"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_gas",
                "available_gas < 6900",
                "q_oog"
              ],
              [
                "q_oog",

              ],
              [
                "q_charge",
                "remaining_gas = available_gas - 6900",
                "q_execute"
              ],
              [
                "q_execute",
                "execution returns result",
                "q_return_success"
              ],
              [
                "q_execute",
                "execution returns empty",
                "q_return_fail"
              ],
              [
                "q_return_success",
                "return result (gas consumed = 6900)",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [
                "q_return_fail",
                "return empty (gas consumed = 6900)",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Gas cost is fixed at 6900 regardless of execution outcome",
            "INV-002: Precompile MUST NOT revert (except for out-of-gas)",
            "INV-003: Invalid inputs consume the same gas as successful verification"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "source_url": "https://ethereum.github.io/consensus-specs/specs/fulu/beacon-chain/",
      "title": "Fulu -- The Beacon Chain",
      "sub_graphs": [
        {
          "id": "SG-001",
          "name": "get_blob_parameters",
          "mermaid_file": "fulu-beacon-chain/SG-001_get_blob_parameters.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_init",
              "q_sort",
              "q_iter",
              "q_check",
              "q_return_entry",
              "q_default",
              "q_final"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "sorted_schedule = sorted(BLOB_SCHEDULE, key=epoch, reverse=True)",
              "for entry in sorted_schedule",
              "has_next_entry",
              "epoch >= entry.EPOCH",
              "epoch < entry.EPOCH",
              "no_more_entries",
              "return BlobParameters(entry.EPOCH, entry.MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK)",
              "return BlobParameters(ELECTRA_FORK_EPOCH, MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK_ELECTRA)"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "sorted_schedule = sorted(BLOB_SCHEDULE, key=epoch, reverse=True)",
                "q_sort"
              ],
              [
                "q_sort",
                "for entry in sorted_schedule",
                "q_iter"
              ],
              [
                "q_iter",
                "has_next_entry",
                "q_check"
              ],
              [
                "q_check",
                "epoch >= entry.EPOCH",
                "q_return_entry"
              ],
              [
                "q_check",
                "epoch < entry.EPOCH",
                "q_iter"
              ],
              [
                "q_iter",
                "no_more_entries",
                "q_default"
              ],
              [
                "q_default",
                "return BlobParameters(ELECTRA_FORK_EPOCH, MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK_ELECTRA)",
                "q_final"
              ],
              [

                "return BlobParameters(entry.EPOCH, entry.MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK)",
                "q_final"
              ]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: BLOB_SCHEDULE entries have unique epoch values",
            "INV-002: All BLOB_SCHEDULE epoch values >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH",
            "INV-003: All max_blobs_per_block values <= MAX_BLOB_COMMITMENTS_PER_BLOCK",
            "INV-004: If no schedule entry matches, defaults to ELECTRA parameters"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-002",
          "name": "process_execution_payload",
          "mermaid_file": "fulu-beacon-chain/SG-002_process_execution_payload.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_init",
              "q_extract",
              "q_check_parent",
              "q_check_randao",
              "q_check_time",
              "q_check_blobs",
              "q_compute_hashes",
              "q_verify_payload",
              "q_cache_header",
              "q_final"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "payload = body.execution_payload",
              "assert payload.parent_hash == state.latest_execution_payload_header.block_hash",
              "assert payload.prev_randao == get_randao_mix(state, get_current_epoch(state))",
              "assert payload.timestamp == compute_time_at_slot(state, state.slot)",
              "assert len(body.blob_kzg_commitments) <= get_blob_parameters(epoch).max_blobs_per_block",
              "versioned_hashes = [kzg_commitment_to_versioned_hash(c) for c in body.blob_kzg_commitments]",
              "assert execution_engine.verify_and_notify_new_payload(NewPayloadRequest(...))",
              "state.latest_execution_payload_header = ExecutionPayloadHeader(...)",
              "return"
            ],
            "E": [
              [
                "q_init",
                "payload = body.execution_payload",
                "q_extract"
              ],
              [
                "q_extract",
                "assert payload.parent_hash == state.latest_execution_payload_header.block_hash",
                "q_check_parent"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_parent",
                "assert payload.prev_randao == get_randao_mix(state, get_current_epoch(state))",
                "q_check_randao"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_randao",
                "assert payload.timestamp == compute_time_at_slot(state, state.slot)",
                "q_check_time"
              ],
              [
                "q_check_time",
                "assert len(body.blob_kzg_commitments) <= get_blob_parameters(epoch).max_blobs_per_block",

              [

                "versioned_hashes = [kzg_commitment_to_versioned_hash(c) for c in body.blob_kzg_commitments]",

            "INV-002: prev_randao must match current epoch randao mix",
            "INV-003: Timestamp must match computed time at slot",
            "INV-004: Blob commitment count must not exceed get_blob_parameters limit (EIP-7892 modification)",
            "INV-005: Execution engine must validate and accept the payload"

        },
        {
          "id": "SG-003",
          "name": "compute_fork_digest",
          "mermaid_file": "fulu-beacon-chain/SG-003_compute_fork_digest.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": [
              "q_init",
              "q_version",
              "q_base",
              "q_blob",
              "q_hash",
              "q_xor",
              "q_final"
            ],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "fork_version = compute_fork_version(epoch)",
